      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="125" name="Else If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$pos2 > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Authenticate with answering question. Plugin passes password for answer.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthKeyboardInteractive"; $ssh; SSH::Username; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="125" name="Else If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$pos3 > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Authenticate with public key file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKey"; $ssh; SSH::Username; "your key path"; "your key path"; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.IsAuthenticated"; $ssh )  ≠ 1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Authentication"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"no authenticated. Supported ways: " & $authuserlist</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Start a new channel</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.OpenSession"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Execute a command</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Execute"; $ssh; SSH::Command )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> We read text in several chunks until no new text is coming any more:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Read some text:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.ReadText"; $ssh; 10000; "UTF8" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$newtext</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("iserror") = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>Length($newText) > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$text & $newText</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>Length($newText) = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$text</Calculation>
    <Field table="SSH" id="99999" name="Result"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Close channel</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Close"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Disconnect</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Disconnect"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Release memory.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Release"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.Disconnect
functions.description: Disconnects the session.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Human readable reason for disconnection.

parameters.name: Reason
parameters.description: One of the Disconnect Reason values.

parameters.name: Lang
parameters.description: Localization string describing the langauge/encoding of the description provided.

examples.label: Disconnect:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.Disconnect";
$ssh
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Disconnect"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.EOF
functions.description: Check a channel's EOF status. Check if the remote host has sent an EOF status for the selected stream. Returns 1 if the remote host has sent EOF, otherwise 0. Also check for other functions like read/write to see if they return an error, e.g. query MBS(" IsError ").

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.Execute
functions.description: Executes something on the server.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Command
parameters.description: The command to execute.

examples.label: Run a command:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.Execute";
$ssh
; "whoami" )]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Execute"; $ssh; "whoami" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Full example:
examples.text_code:
# Start a new SSH session
Set Variable [
$ssh
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.New
" )]
# Connect to an IP
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Connect
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Host
;
SSH::Port
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# Run the session handshake.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.SessionHandshake
";
$ssh
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# We can show the hostkey. You can compare it to known hostkey.
Set Field [
SSH::HostKeyHash
;
MBS
( "
SSH.HostKey
";
$ssh
)]
# We query supported authentication ways
Set Variable [
$authuserlist
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthList
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
)]
Set Field [
SSH::UserAuthList
;
$authuserlist
]
Set Variable [
$pos1
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "password"; 1; 1 )]
Set Variable [
$pos2
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "keyboard-interactive"; 1; 1 )]
Set Variable [
$pos3
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "publickey"; 1; 1 )]
If [
$pos1
> 0]
# Authenticate with password
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthPassword
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
;
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
Else If [
$pos2
> 0]
# Authenticate with answering question. Plugin passes password for answer.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthKeyboardInteractive
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
;
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
Else If [
$pos3
> 0]
# Authenticate with public key file
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthPublicKey
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
; "your key path"; "your key path";
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
End If
If [
MBS
( "
SSH.IsAuthenticated
";
$ssh
)  ≠ 1]
Show Custom Dialog ["Authentication"; "no authenticated. Supported ways: " &
$authuserlist
]
Else
# Start a new channel
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.OpenSession
";
$ssh
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# Execute a command
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.Execute";
$ssh
;
SSH::Command
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# We read text in several chunks until no new text is coming any more:
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:""]
Loop
Pause/Resume Script [Duration (seconds): ,1]
# Read some text:
Set Variable [
$newtext
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.ReadText
";
$ssh
; 10000; "UTF8" )]
If [
MBS
("iserror") = 0]
If [Length(
$newText
) > 0]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
$text
&
$newText
]
End If
Exit Loop If [Length(
$newText
) = 0]
End If
End Loop
Set Field [
SSH::Result
;
$text
]
End If
End If
# Close channel
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.CloseChannel
";
$ssh
)]
# Disconnect
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Disconnect
";
$ssh
)]
End If
End If
End If
# Release memory.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Release
";
$ssh
)]

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKey"; $ssh; SSH::Username; "your key path"; "your key path"; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.IsAuthenticated"; $ssh )  ≠ 1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Authentication"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"no authenticated. Supported ways: " & $authuserlist</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Start a new channel</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.OpenSession"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Execute a command</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Execute"; $ssh; SSH::Command )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Connect error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> We read text in several chunks until no new text is coming any more:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Read some text:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.ReadText"; $ssh; 10000; "UTF8" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$newtext</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("iserror") = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>Length($newText) > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$text & $newText</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>Length($newText) = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$text</Calculation>
    <Field table="SSH" id="99999" name="Result"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Close channel</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.CloseChannel"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Disconnect</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Disconnect"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Release memory.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Release"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.Flush
functions.description: Flush streams for this channel. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.Execute - SSH.FreeChannel 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: What to flush. Can be empty, "stdout", "stderr", "all" or "ExtendedData".

functions.name: SSH.FreeChannel
functions.description: Frees the SSH channel. This is done automatically when you release the connection with SSH.Release or you start a new channel with SSH.OpenSession .

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetExitState
functions.description: Get the remote exit code. Returns the exit code raised by the process running on the remote host at the other end of the named channel. Note that the exit status may not be available if the remote end has not yet set its status to closed. Returns 0 on failure, otherwise the Exit Status reported by remote host. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.FreeChannel - SSH.GetIP 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetIP
functions.description: Queries IP or domain used to connect. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.GetExitState - SSH.GetPort 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetPort
functions.description: Queries port used to connect. This function is free to use. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.GetIP - SSH.GetTag 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetTag
functions.description: Queries tag value. There is only a tag if set one with SSH.SetTag before.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetTimeout
functions.description: Queries timeout.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.GetUserName
functions.description: The user name we got authenticated for. This function is free to use. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.GetTimeout - SSH.HostKey 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.HostKey
functions.description: Returns the hex encoded host key.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Selector
parameters.description: What value to return. Default is hex. hex: Return the key hex encoded. base64: Return key as base 64 encoded. length: Length of key in bytes. type: RSA or DSS, ECDSA256 or unknown.

examples.label: Query length of key:

( "SSH.HostKey";
$SSH
; "length")

functions.name: SSH.HostKeyHash
functions.description: Returns the hex encoded host key hash. MD5 is 16 bytes, so 32 hex characters. SHA1 is 20 bytes, so 40 hex characters. Added SHA256 for MBS Plugin 9.5 with 32 bytes. This function checks for a license. Created 7th June 2016 , last changed 18th September 2019 SSH.HostKey - SSH.IsAuthenticated 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Which type to return. Can be MD5 or SHA1. SHA1 is default if empty or not provided.

functions.name: SSH.IsAuthenticated
functions.description: Queries the authentication state. Returns 1 if authenticated or 0 if not.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

examples.label: Check status:
examples.text_code:
If [
MBS
( "SSH.IsAuthenticated";
$ssh
) ≠ 1 ]
Show Custom Dialog [ Title: "Authentication"; Message: "no authenticated. Supported ways: " &
$authuserlist
; Default Button: “OK”, Commit: “Yes”; Button 2: “Cancel”, Commit: “No” ]
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>If [ MBS( "SSH.IsAuthenticated"; $ssh ) ≠ 1 ]
	Show Custom Dialog [ Title: "Authentication"; Message: "no authenticated. Supported ways: " & $authuserlist; Default Button: “OK”, Commit: “Yes”; Button 2: “Cancel”, Commit: “No” ]
End If</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.List
functions.description: Lists all IDs of SSH connection objects. Returns IDs for all SSH objects in memory. If this list is growing, you may have forgotten to call SSH.Release in your scripts.

examples.label: List all object IDs:

$list

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$list</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.New
functions.description: Creates a new SSH session. Please use SSH.Release later to free memory. If you just need SSH file transfers, please use CURL functions.

";
$ssh
)]

examples.label: Full example:
examples.text_code:
# Start a new SSH session
Set Variable [
$ssh
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.New" )]
# Connect to an IP
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Connect
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Host
;
SSH::Port
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# Run the session handshake.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.SessionHandshake
";
$ssh
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# We can show the hostkey. You can compare it to known hostkey.
Set Field [
SSH::HostKeyHash
;
MBS
( "
SSH.HostKey
";
$ssh
)]
# We query supported authentication ways
Set Variable [
$authuserlist
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthList
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
)]
Set Field [
SSH::UserAuthList
;
$authuserlist
]
Set Variable [
$pos1
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "password"; 1; 1 )]
Set Variable [
$pos2
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "keyboard-interactive"; 1; 1 )]
Set Variable [
$pos3
; Value:Position (
$authuserlist
; "publickey"; 1; 1 )]
If [
$pos1
> 0]
# Authenticate with password
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthPassword
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
;
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
Else If [
$pos2
> 0]
# Authenticate with answering question. Plugin passes password for answer.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthKeyboardInteractive
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
;
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
Else If [
$pos3
> 0]
# Authenticate with public key file
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthPublicKey
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Username
; "your key path"; "your key path";
SSH::Password
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
End If
End If
If [
MBS
( "
SSH.IsAuthenticated
";
$ssh
)  ≠ 1]
Show Custom Dialog ["Authentication"; "no authenticated. Supported ways: " &
$authuserlist
]
Else
# Start a new channel
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.OpenSession
";
$ssh
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# Execute a command
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Execute
";
$ssh
;
SSH::Command
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Connect error";
$r
]
Else
# We read text in several chunks until no new text is coming any more:
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:""]
Loop
Pause/Resume Script [Duration (seconds): ,1]
# Read some text:
Set Variable [
$newtext
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.ReadText
";
$ssh
; 10000; "UTF8" )]
If [
MBS
("iserror") = 0]
If [Length(
$newText
) > 0]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
$text
&
$newText
]
End If
Exit Loop If [Length(
$newText
) = 0]
End If
End Loop
Set Field [
SSH::Result
;
$text
]
End If
End If
# Close channel
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.CloseChannel
";
$ssh
)]
# Disconnect
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Disconnect
";
$ssh
)]
End If
End If
End If
# Release memory.
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Release
";
$ssh
)]

  </Step>

      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.SessionHandshake"; $ssh)</Calculation>
    </Value>

  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">

    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>

    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> We can show the hostkey. You can compare it to known hostkey.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.HostKey"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    <Field table="SSH" id="99999" name="HostKeyHash"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> We query supported authentication ways</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.userauthlist"; $ssh; SSH::Username)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$authuserlist</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$authuserlist</Calculation>
    <Field table="SSH" id="99999" name="UserAuthList"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Position ( $authuserlist ; "password"; 1; 1 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Position ( $authuserlist ; "keyboard-interactive"; 1; 1 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>

  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>

    <Value>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>,1</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Read some text:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.ReadText"; $ssh; 10000; "UTF8" )</Calculation>
    </Value>

      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("iserror") = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>Length($newText) > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$text & $newText</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>Length($newText) = 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$text</Calculation>
    <Field table="SSH" id="99999" name="Result"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Close channel</Text>
  </Step>

    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Disconnect</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Disconnect"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Release memory.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Release"; $ssh )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.ReadHex
functions.description: Reads bytes from channel and returns them hex encoded. The text returned may be shorter than length bytes.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Length
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes to read.

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.description: Which stream to read. Can be stdout or stderr. Stdout is default if parameter is empty or missing.

functions.result: Returns text encoded as hex or error message.

functions.name: SSH.ReadText
functions.description: Reads bytes from channel and returns them as text. The text returned may be shorter than length bytes.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Length
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes to read.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for result. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.description: Which stream to read. Can be stdout or stderr. Stdout is default if parameter is empty or missing.

functions.name: SSH.RequestPTY

functions.name: SSH.Tunnel.Run
functions.signature: MBS( "SSH.Tunnel.Run"; SSH; RemoteHost; RemotePort; LocalHost; LocalPort )
functions.description: Creates a SSH tunnel on the session. Please create, connect and authenticate a session for use as a tunnel. For best result, please don't use the same session for other things while tunnel is running. The tunnel allows currently one connection through it, e.g. run one tunnel per MySQL connection to go through the tunnel. If you need multiple tunnels, please create multiple SSH connections. The MBS Plugin can spin of a new preemptive thread to run a tunnel to forward a SSH connection from local socket to remote server via SSH tunnel. This works well e.g. for database access with MySQL. By using our own thread, we are not blocking or blocked by your FileMaker scripts.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: RemoteHost
parameters.description: The remote host to forward to. Can be IP or domain name.

parameters.name: RemotePort
parameters.description: The destination port to connect to.

parameters.name: LocalHost
parameters.description: The local interface to listen on.

parameters.name: LocalPort
parameters.description: The local port to listen on.

examples.label: Run SSH Tunnel to connect to MySQL:
examples.text_code:

Set Variable [

; Value: "
127.0
.
0.1
" ]

; Value: 3306 ]

$DatabaseIP
; Value: "db.myserver.test" ]
Set Variable [
$DatabasePort
; Value: 3306 ]
# create connection
Set Variable [
$ssh
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.New
" ) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Connect
";
$ssh
;
$SSHServerIP
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.SessionHandshake
";
$ssh

$r
; Value:

( "
SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile
";
$ssh
; "username"; "" ;
$keypair_path
; "password" ) ]

$auth

( "
SSH.IsAuthenticated
";
$ssh
) ]
# must be 1

$r
; Value:

( "SSH.Tunnel.Run";
$ssh
;
$DatabaseIP
;
$DatabasePort
;
$LocalIP
;
$LocalPort
) ]

";
$ssh

$Connection

("
SQL.NewConnection
") ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:

("
SQL.SetConnectionOption
";
$Connection
; "MYSQL.LIBS";
$mysql_path
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
SQL.SetClient
";
$Connection
; "MySQL") ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
SQL.Connect
";
$Connection
;
$LocalIP
& "," &
$LocalPort
& "@DatabaseName"; "UserName"; "password"; "MySQL") ]
Set Variable [
$tunnel_mess
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Tunnel.Messages
";
$ssh
) ]
Show Custom Dialog [
$tunnel_mess
&  ¶ &
$r
]
# should show OK for connect and for tunnel that it's forwarding data
# do query here

Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
SQL.FreeConnection
";
$Connection
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Tunnel.Cancel
";
$ssh
) ]
Pause/Resume Script [ Duration (seconds): .1 ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Disconnect
";
$ssh
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Release
";
$ssh

<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> some settings like local IP/Port</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>

    </Repetition>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$DatabaseIP</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>3306 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$DatabasePort</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> create connection</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.New" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$ssh</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Connect"; $ssh; $SSHServerIP ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.SessionHandshake"; $ssh) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> using private key file here, but username+password is also possible</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile"; $ssh; "username"; "" ; $keypair_path ; "password" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.IsAuthenticated"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>

      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>

  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">

  </Step>

    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Tunnel.Messages"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

  </Step>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Connection</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("SQL.SetConnectionOption"; $Connection; "MYSQL.LIBS"; $mysql_path ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("SQL.SetClient"; $Connection; "MySQL") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("SQL.Connect"; $Connection; $LocalIP & "," & $LocalPort & "@DatabaseName"; "UserName"; "password"; "MySQL") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Tunnel.Messages"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$tunnel_mess</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> $tunnel_mess &  ¶ & $r </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation/>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> should show OK for connect and for tunnel that it's forwarding data</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> do query here</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> disconnect</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("SQL.FreeConnection"; $Connection) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Tunnel.Cancel"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="62" name="Pause/Resume Script">
    <PauseTime value="ForDuration"/>
    <Calculation>.1 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Disconnect"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Release"; $ssh ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.text_code:
# some settings like local IP/Port
Set Variable [
$LocalIP
; Value: "
127.0
.
0.1
" ]
Set Variable [
$LocalPort
; Value: 12345 ]
# the SSH server to connect through
Set Variable [
$SSHServerIP
; Value: "myserver.test" ]
# database to connect
Set Variable [
$DatabaseIP
; Value: "db.myserver.test" ]
Set Variable [
$DatabasePort
; Value: 27017 ]
# create connection
Set Variable [
$ssh
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.New
" ) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.Connect
";
$ssh
;
$SSHServerIP
) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.SessionHandshake
";
$ssh
) ]
# using private key file here, but username+password is also possible
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile
";
$ssh
; "username"; "" ;
$keypair_path
; "password" ) ]
Set Variable [
$auth
; Value:
MBS
( "
SSH.IsAuthenticated
";
$ssh
) ]
# must be 1
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.Tunnel.Run";
$ssh
;
$DatabaseIP
;
$DatabasePort
;
$LocalIP
;
$LocalPort
) ]
Pause/Resume Script [ Duration (seconds): .5 ]
Set Variable [
$tunnel_mess
; Value:

SSH.Tunnel.Messages
";
$ssh

# now this should show that tunnel is waiting.
Set Variable [
$MongoDB
; Value:

Set Variable [

MongoDB.SetURI

";
$MongoDB

$list

$MongoDB

SSH.Disconnect
";

functions.name: SSH.Tunnel.Running
functions.description: Queries whether tunnel is running. Returns 1 if running or 0 if not.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.Tunnel.SetKeepAlive
functions.description: Sets keep alive status. If set to 1, TCP keep alive probes will be sent to avoid TCP/IP timeouts. Set to 0 (default behavior) to disable keep alive probes. See also SSH.SetTimeout .

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new setting. Pass 1 to enable keep-alive or 0 to disable.

examples.label: Enable keep alive:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "SSH.Tunnel.SetKeepAlive";
$SSH
; 1 ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.Tunnel.SetKeepAlive"; $SSH; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.UserAuthKeyboardInteractive
functions.description: Authenticate a session using keyboard-interactive authentication. The server will send question to plugin and plugin answers with the given password.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: Name of user to attempt plain password authentication for.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Password to use for authenticating username.

examples.label: Login interactively:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthKeyboardInteractive"; $ssh; SSH::Username; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.UserAuthList
functions.description: List supported authentication methods. Send a SSH_USERAUTH_NONE request to the remote host. Unless the remote host is configured to accept none as a viable authentication scheme (unlikely), it will return SSH_USERAUTH_FAILURE along with a listing of what authentication schemes it does support. In the unlikely event that none authentication succeeds, this method with return "". This case may be distinguished from a failing case by examining Authenticated.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: Username which will be used while authenticating. Note that most server implementations do not permit attempting authentication with different usernames between requests. Therefore this must be the same username you will use on later userauth calls.

examples.label: Query authentication list:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.userauthlist"; $ssh; SSH::Username)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$authuserlist</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.UserAuthPassword
functions.description: Authenticate a session with username and password. Attempt basic password authentication. Note that many SSH servers which appear to support ordinary password authentication actually have it disabled and use Keyboard Interactive authentication (routed via PAM or another authentication backed) instead.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: Name of user to attempt plain password authentication for.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Password to use for authenticating username.

examples.label: Login with password:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPassword"; $ssh; SSH::Username; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.UserAuthPublicKey
functions.signature: MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKey"; SSH; UserName; PublicKey; PrivateKey; Passphrase )
functions.description: Authenticate a session with a public key, read from memory. Attempt public key authentication using a PEM encoded private key file stored in text variable or field.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: user name to authenticate as.

parameters.name: PublicKey
parameters.description: The public key. Optional. Pass empty text if you only have private key.

functions.name: SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile
functions.signature: MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile"; SSH; UserName; PublicKey; PrivateKey { ; Passphrase } )
functions.description: Authenticate a session with a public key, read from a file. Attempt public key authentication using a PEM encoded private key file stored on disk.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: user name to authenticate as.

parameters.name: PublicKey
parameters.description: Path of the public key file. (e.g. /etc/ssh/hostkey.pub). Optional. Pass empty text if you only have private key.

parameters.name: PrivateKey
parameters.description: Path of the private key file. (e.g. /etc/ssh/hostkey)

parameters.name: Passphrase
parameters.description: Passphrase to use when decoding privatekey. Can be empty.

examples.label: Login with public key:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile"; $ssh; SSH::Username; "your key path"; "your key path"; SSH::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Login with keys:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile"; $ssh; SSH::Username; "/Users/cs/Desktop/id_rsa.pub"; "/Users/cs/Desktop/id_rsa"; SSH::Password ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: SSH.WaitClosed
functions.description: Wait for the remote to close the channel. Enter a temporary blocking state until the remote host closes the named channel. Typically sent after Close in order to examine the exit status. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.UserAuthPublicKeyFile - SSH.WaitEOF 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.WaitEOF
functions.description: Wait for the remote end to acknowledge an EOF request. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.WaitClosed - SSH.WaitSocket 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.WaitSocket
functions.description: Waits on the socket for sending or receiving. This function checks for a license. Created 29th May 2016 , last changed 29th May 2016 SSH.WaitEOF - SSH.WriteHex 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

functions.name: SSH.WriteHex
functions.description: Writes text to the channel. You pass the text hex encoded. For example for "Hello" you pass "48656C6C6F".

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to send in hex encoding.

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.description: Which stream to write. Can be stdout or stderr. Stdout is default if parameter is empty or missing.

functions.result: Returns the number of bytes written or an error message.

functions.name: SSH.WriteText
functions.description: Writes text to the channel.

parameters.name: SSH
parameters.description: The SSH session reference number from the plugin.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to send.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.description: Which stream to write. Can be stdout or stderr. Stdout is default if parameter is empty or missing.

functions.result: Returns the number of bytes written or an error message.

functions.name: UUID.Formatted
functions.description: Creates a new UUID/GUID and returns it as a formatted string. Please use 2.6 plugins, if you need this functions. We fixed important bug in 2.6pr1.

parameters.name: WithBrackets
parameters.description: Default is 1 to include curly brackets.

MBS
( "UUID.Formatted" )

<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UUID.Formatted" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: UUID without curly brackets:

( "UUID.Formatted" ; 0)

    </Value>

      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UUID.FromNumber
functions.description: Converts from formatted UUID to UUID number.

parameters.name: UUID Number
parameters.description: The UUID number to convert.

examples.label: Convert UUID:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UUID.FromNumber"; "274265811883194525999390578526946467087" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Convert from one to other direction:
examples.text_code:
Let ( [
u = Get(UUID) ;
n =
MBS
( "
UUID.ToNumber
"; u );
b =
MBS
( "UUID.FromNumber"; n ) ];
u & ¶ & n & ¶ & b )
Example result:
819AD32B-23D3-4CA7-ACAB-F2BE48B6200F
172274308178793290359797804461655990287
819AD32B-23D3-4CA7-ACAB-F2BE48B6200F
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let ( [
u = Get(UUID) ; 
n = MBS( "UUID.ToNumber"; u );
b = MBS( "UUID.FromNumber"; n ) ]; 
u & ¶ & n & ¶ & b )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UUID.UUIDv7
functions.description: Creates a new UUIDv7 and returns it as a formatted string. UUIDv7 is a version of Universally Unique Identifier that combines a Unix timestamp with random bits, allowing for both uniqueness and sortability in high-load databases and distributed systems. It is designed to improve performance and reduce the likelihood of ID collisions compared to previous UUID versions.

parameters.name: WithBrackets
parameters.description: Whether to include curly brackets. Pass 1 if you like brackets. Default is 0 to disable.

examples.label: Make an UUIDv7.
examples.text_code:
MBS
("UUID.UUIDv7")
Example result:
0199A020-B074-7BD2-9453-1A0CDD1AFA4F
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("UUID.UUIDv7")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: WebRequest.GetBodyAsContainer
functions.description: Queries body for HTTP request as container. If the user sent a picture, PDF or other files, you may just query them as container value. e.g. in Terminal upload a picture to grab it with this function: curl --upload-file /path/Pictures/cat.jpg -v http://localhost:9999/cat.jpg

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The file name to use for container. Also defines the type of container value. We try to get it from the URL usually.

examples.label: Reads body as container:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("WebRequest.GetBodyAsContainer"; $WebRequest) </Calculation>
    <Field table="WebHook" id="99999" name="Container "/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: WebRequest.GetBodySize

("WebRequest.GetRemotePort";
$WebRequest
) ]

functions.name: WebRequest.GetSSL
functions.description: Whether this web request comes in with SSL.

parameters.name: WebHook
parameters.description: The reference number of the web hook.

functions.name: WebRequest.GetSize
functions.description: Queries size of whole request. This includes the body size returned by WebRequest.GetBodySize function.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

functions.name: WebRequest.GetState
functions.description: Queries the state of the web request. State 0 is freshly allocated, 1 is connection received, 2 is data arrived, 3 is processed. If you use WebHook.Check , you may only see requests with state 3, but if you use WebHook.List , you may see earlier states like 1 and 2.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

functions.name: WebRequest.GetTag
functions.description: Queries the tag value.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

functions.name: WebRequest.GetURL
functions.description: Queries HTTP URL received. This is the relative URL usually, so you may need to build full path using host name and http prefix.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

examples.label: Query relative URL:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: WebRequest.GetWebHook
functions.description: Queries the web hook for this web request. If you have multiple hooks, defines which one you reference.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

functions.name: WebRequest.List
functions.description: Lists all web request objects with their reference numbers. Check state of each with e.g. WebRequest.GetState function.

functions.name: WebRequest.Release
functions.description: Releases the object and all memory used for it. Please call this when you are done with a web request. Closes connection if it is still open.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

functions.name: WebRequest.Send
functions.description: Send custom answer. This allows you to assemble a custom HTTP response and send it. The answer is sent above the connection to the other side where the request is coming from. Please make sure your HTTP response header uses CRLF as line endings and ends with two CRLF. Then you may send additional content like e.g. JSON data. Returns number of bytes sent on success.

parameters.name: WebRequest
parameters.description: The reference number of the web request.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to send out. Should use CRLF as line endings and end with two CRLF.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for result. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

examples.label: Send HTTP response:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$text
; Value: "HTTP/
1.1
201 Tested¶Server: MyServer
1.0
¶Connection: close¶Content-Length: 0¶¶" ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "
Text.ReplaceNewLine
";
$Text
; 3 ) ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("WebRequest.Send";
$WebRequest
;
$text
; "UTF-8") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"HTTP/1.1 201 Tested¶Server: MyServer 1.0¶Connection: close¶Content-Length: 0¶¶" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("WebRequest.Send"; $WebRequest; $text; "UTF-8") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: WMIQuery.Connect
functions.signature: MBS( "WMIQuery.Connect"; WMIQueryRef; NetworkResource { ; UserName; Password; Locale; Authority } )
functions.description: Connects to WMI server. Connects through DCOM to a WMI namespace on the computer specified in the strNetworkResource parameter.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

parameters.name: NetworkResource
parameters.description: The path of the correct WMI namespace to connect to. For local access to the default namespace, use a simple object path: "root\default" or "\\.\root\default". For access to the default namespace on a remote computer using COM or Microsoft-compatible networking, include the computer name: "\\myserver\root\default". The computer name also can be a DNS name or IP address. Starting with Windows Vista, Connect can connect with computers running IPv6 using an IPv6 address.

parameters.name: UserName
parameters.description: The user name you need for a connection. An empty value indicates the current security context. If the user name is from a domain different from the current domain, the string may contain the domain name and user name separated by a backslash.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: The password you need for a connection. An empty value indicates the current security context. A blank string "" specifies a valid zero-length password.

parameters.name: Locale
parameters.description: If empty, the current locale is used. If not empty, this parameter indicates the correct locale for information retrieval. For Microsoft locale identifiers, the format of the string is "MS_xxx", where xxx is a string in hexadecimal form that indicates the Local Identification (LCID), for example, American English would appear as "MS_409". If an invalid locale is specified, then the method returns "Invalid Parameter". Windows 7:  If an invalid locale is specified, then the default locale of the server is used unless there is a server-supported locale provided by the user application.

parameters.name: Authority
parameters.description: This parameter contains the name of the domain of the user to authenticate. Authority can have the following values: Empty: If you leave this parameter blank, NTLM authentication is used and the NTLM domain of the current user is used. If the domain is specified in strUser, which is the recommended location, then it must not be specified here. Specifying the domain in both parameters results in an invalid parameter error. Kerberos:<principal name>Kerberos authentication is used and this parameter should contain a Kerberos principal name. NTLMDOMAIN:<domain name>NT LAN Manager authentication is used and this parameter should contain an NTLM domain name.

examples.label: Connect locally:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "WMIQuery.Connect"; "ROOT\CimV2" )
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "WMIQuery.Connect"; "ROOT\CimV2" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

$q
; Value:

("
WMIQuery.New
")]

$q

$q

WMI Query::NetworkResource

;
WMI Query::Authority
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0]
#run query

("
WMIQuery.Query
";
$q

WMI Query::Query

If [

("IsError") = 0]

Go to Related Record [Show only related records; From table: “Result”; Using layout: “Result” (Result)]
Go to Layout [“Result” (Result)]
Delete All Records [No dialog]

Set Variable [

("

";
$q

Commit Records/Requests [No dialog]

+1]

>

functions.name: WMIQuery.JSON
functions.description: Queries the query result as JSON.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

functions.name: WMIQuery.New
functions.description: Creates a new WMI Query object.

functions.name: WMIQuery.Next
functions.description: Queries the next item in the result of a query. Returns OK if we have a next one or "End of list" in case of end.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

functions.result: Returns OK, End of list or error.

functions.name: WMIQuery.PropertyNames
functions.description: Queries a list of property names for current item. You can than use those names to query property types and values.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

functions.name: WMIQuery.PropertyType
functions.description: Queries data type of a property. The type can be prefixed with "Array" for arrays. Common types include Null, Empty, Int32, Float64, Text and Boolean.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the property to query.

functions.name: WMIQuery.PropertyValue
functions.description: Queries the value of the property. The plugin returns text and number types as text or numbers. Other data types are tried to convert to text. A special handling is adde for Arrays of Int32 and Text to return them as lists. If you find an unsupported property type, please tell us, so we can add it here.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the property to query.

functions.name: WMIQuery.Query
functions.description: Executes a query. Works in FileMaker 14, but fails in FileMaker 15/16 as MBS Plugin can’t upgrade security to administrator and most system queries need permissions. see also https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/aa392902(v=vs.85).aspx

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New and destroy them with WMIQuery.Release .

parameters.name: Query
parameters.description: The query to run.

examples.label: Query network adapters:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "WMIQuery.Query";
$WMIQueryRef
; "Select * from Win32_NetworkAdapter" )
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "WMIQuery.Query"; $WMIQueryRef; "Select * from Win32_NetworkAdapter" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: WMIQuery.Release
functions.description: Releases a query object.

parameters.name: WMIQueryRef
parameters.description: The reference to the query. Create it with WMIQuery.New .

functions.name: WMIQuery.ReleaseAll
functions.description: Frees all query objects. Be aware that on a server this may free objects, which are used by other scripts running in parallel!

examples.label: Cleanup:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "WMIQuery.ReleaseAll" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "WMIQuery.ReleaseAll" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>
